title: inula acris
intro: Inula acris, also known as tansy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Inula acris include its ability to treat digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and ease menstrual cramps. Inula acris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
